title: Suzhou, Jiangsu — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Suzhou, Jiangsu: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Suzhou is a city in Jiangsu with a population of 12,748,000. Known as the ‘Venice of the East’ for its classical gardens and canals, Suzhou combines historic charm with a strong manufacturing economy.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
